name: Main Theme
description: The main theme - including the skin of the page and decorating items

attribute_definitions.name: Header Position
attribute_definitions.description: sticky: header stays fixed at the top as the user scrolls. scroll: header scrolls away with the page.

attribute_definitions.name: Shrink Logo on Scroll
attribute_definitions.description: When enabled, the logo shrinks smoothly as the user scrolls. Only applies when Header Position is sticky.

region_definitions.name: The Header including the main menu
